name: market-my-spec
description: Marketing for founders, in Claude Code. Three skills that work together: /marketing-strategy (guided 8-step strategy flow), /daily-plan (picks today's activities, manages your roster, scaffolds project-local skills), /marketing-stack (sets up the infrastructure your strategy needs — 17 opinionated recipes covering Reddit, Wix, Ghost, WordPress, Stripe, HubSpot, claude-seo, Postiz, Meta Ads, Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, YouTube, GSC, GA4, Resend).
